accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: Stores the Salesforce account ID of the verified user.

categoriasPreferidas.title: Preferencias
categoriasPreferidas.description: Stores a list of the user's favourite categories.

cidade.title: Cidade
cidade.description: Stores the billing city retrieved from the account.

email.title: Email
email.description: Stores the email address associated with the account.

erroMsg.title: Erro
erroMsg.description: Stores any error message if the session check fails.

firstName.title: Primeiro Nome
firstName.description: Stores the first name retrieved from the account record.

fullName.title: Nome Completo
fullName.description: Stores the full name for personalisation in the chat.

isLoggedIn.title: Autenticado
isLoggedIn.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the user is successfully authenticated.
